topic_title: Test-set contamination audit of healthcare LLM benchmarks

top_findings.name: SeekingDream/Static-to-Dynamic-LLMEval
top_findings.why_overlaps: GitHub repo 'SeekingDream/Static-to-Dynamic-LLMEval' (503 stars) provides an implementation of 'data contamination'. Description: the official github repository of the paper "recent advances in large language model benchmarks against data contaminati.
top_findings.how_we_differ: Our proposed work focuses specifically on 'Test-set contamination audit of healthcare LLM benchmarks'. Articulate a concrete contribution gap versus this existing work before promoting to GO (see §6 verification log).
